arts.ttl: 'That quote I can give you' - Arne Slot reacts to Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract comments
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot was inevitably asked about what Mohamed Salah had to say about his contract situation

arts.ttl: Mo Salah slammed over ‘selfish’ Liverpool contract comments
arts.sum: Mo Salah has been branded “selfish” for making public comments over his contract situation at Liverpool by Jamie Carragher. The Egyptian winger’s current deal expires at the end of the season, but he told reporters after Sunday’s 3-2 win over Southampton that he is disappointed he has not received “an offer to stay at the […] The post Mo Salah slammed over ‘selfish’ Liverpool contract comments first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed unlikely boost in Real Madrid transfer race
arts.sum: While Rodrygo could reportedly leave Real Madrid next summer, Los Blancos boss Carlo Ancelotti remains a huge admirer of the Brazil forward. Real Madrid superstar Rodrygo could be set to leave the club next summer, according to sensational reports in Spain.

arts.ttl: 'I was there when Jude Bellingham first emerged – what he did was f***ing frightening'

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold not fit to start as Arne Slot updates on Chiesa, Alisson & Jota
arts.sum: Also pictured alongside Alexander-Arnold at the AXA Training Centre was Federico Chiesa, with Slot updating on his fitness along with the fit-again Harvey Elliott and the injured trio of Alisson, Diogo Jota and Kostas Tsimikas . Trent Alexander-Arnold is back in training but will not be considered to start against Real Madrid, with Arne Slot providing an update on Liverpool’s injuries.

arts.ttl: Salah not distracted by contract talks - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah is not being distracted by contract talks and speculation about his future, says manager Arne Slot.
